indications.text:
SYMPAZAN® is indicated for the adjunctive treatment of seizures associated with Lennox-Gastaut Syndrome
(LGS) in patients 2 years of age or older.

SYMPAZANTM is indicated for the adjunctive treatment of seizures associated with Lennox-Gastaut
Syndrome (LGS) in patients 2 years of age or older.
